---
title: Microarchitectural Implications of Event-driven Server-side Web Applications
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Daniel Richins
- Matthew Halpern
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/micro15.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/microarchitectural-implications-of-event-driven-server-side-web-applications
journ: MICRO
year: 2015
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
teaser: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/micro-2015-lightning-session-talk
award: IEEE Micro Top Picks from Computer Architecture Conferences in 2015 (Honorable
  Mention)
pub_number: 11
---
